headline: WPP Tops '25 Billings, No. 2 Publicis Biggest Gainer
summary: That's according to agency researcher COMvergence, which has issued its full-year 2025 Global Billings and Market Share Report.

headline: NEW REPORT CONFIRMS OMNICOM MEDIA AS LARGEST GLOBAL MEDIA MANAGEMENT NETWORK FOLLOWING THE INTEGRATION OF OMG AND MEDIABRANDS
summary: Omnicom Media, an Omnicom (NYSE: OMC) Connected Capability, has been recognized in the COMvergence Final 2025 Global & Regional Billings Rankings as the world's largest media management organization, with total billings of $75.6 billion.
